name: chat-soft-codex-bridge
description: Bridge Chat Soft mobile conversations into VS Code Codex-compatible language models and send replies back.

commands.title: Chat Soft Codex: Show Available Models
Chat Soft Codex: Reset Conversation History
Chat Soft Codex: Bind Current Thread

chatSoftCodexBridge.enabled.description: Automatically start the bridge when VS Code finishes starting.

chatSoftCodexBridge.agentId.description: Agent ID registered in Chat Soft.

chatSoftCodexBridge.agentName.description: Agent display name shown in Chat Soft.

chatSoftCodexBridge.agentDescription.default: VS Code 中的 Codex 会话桥接代理
chatSoftCodexBridge.agentDescription.description: Agent description shown in Chat Soft.

chatSoftCodexBridge.pollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval used to fetch new Chat Soft messages.

chatSoftCodexBridge.historyMessageLimit.description: How many turns of local history to keep for the mobile Codex conversation.

chatSoftCodexBridge.codexExecutable.description: Optional full path to codex.exe. Leave empty to reuse the executable bundled with the OpenAI Codex VS Code extension.

chatSoftCodexBridge.workspaceRoot.description: Workspace directory passed to the Codex CLI for this bridge conversation.

chatSoftCodexBridge.proxyUrl.description: Optional explicit proxy URL for Codex CLI. Leave empty to reuse VS Code's http.proxy setting.
